layout_note: Typed attachment table (continuation). Columns: SP/DC/JT owner | Asset | EIF | Value of Asset (Block B) | Income Type(s) (Block C) | Amount of Income (Block D) | Transaction (Block E). The 'ARECO LP Commercial Property' block lists three SP property locations and three DC property locations; income is reported in aggregate on a single line per owner ('Rent (for all properties)') rather than per-location: SP aggregate rent = $100,001-$1,000,000; DC aggregate rent = $15,001-$50,000. That aggregate income is recorded on the first (Cincinnati) location row of each owner with a note, and left null on the other locations to avoid double-counting. Two trailing rows are pointers to a separately attached 'MS Areco Schedule'.

uncertainties.note: the ARECO LP Commercial Property SP rent is reported once as 'Rent (for all properties)' = $100,001-$1,000,000 covering all three SP property locations; recorded on the Cincinnati row only, null on the other two SP locations to avoid double-counting

the ARECO LP Commercial Property DC rent is reported once as 'Rent (for all properties)' = $15,001-$50,000 covering all three DC property locations; recorded on the Cincinnati row only, null on the other two DC locations
